basic_info.title: Shadowgate
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the adventure genre that defined the point-and-click style for a generation, praised for its atmosphere and challenging puzzles despite its notorious difficulty.

play_today.details: Modern remastered version with Unity engine; available on Steam and GOG.com. Features enhanced visuals, achievements support, and official updates.
Official port of the remaster with native macOS support. DRM-free version available on GOG.com.
Original DOS version playable via emulator. Features community patches for improved visuals and compatibility.

recommended_patches.name: Graphical Facelift
recommended_patches.description: Enhanced visuals using GBC port assets; resolves outdated textures.

recommended_patches.name: Font Improvement
recommended_patches.description: Replaces original NES-style font with clearer text for better readability.

play_today.details: The definitive modern experience via Steam. Features native widescreen support, full controller remapping, cloud saves, and Steam Achievements. Includes the 2015 remake's enhanced content, voice acting, and quality-of-life improvements like a customized UI. Regular patches have fixed launch issues, making it the most stable and accessible version for new players.

The original 1987 release designed specifically for the Mac platform. Offers the authentic, unaltered experience with the original soundtrack and graphics. While it lacks modern conveniences like save states or widescreen, it is historically significant as the version ICOM Simulations intended. Best played via emulation for preservationists seeking the true retro atmosphere.

optimal_settings: Enable 68040 CPU for faster emulation speed
Set RAM to 32MB to ensure smooth performance
Enable Sound to hear the original soundtrack
Set Resolution to 640x480 for authentic display
Configure floppy disk image mounting for game loading

play_today.details: A faithful port of the original Macintosh adventure. While it features slightly reduced resolution and color palette compared to the Mac version, it retains the core gameplay and atmosphere. The C64 version is highly regarded for its sound effects and is a staple of the platform's library. Best experienced via emulator for modern convenience.

optimal_settings: Enable SID2 chip for enhanced sound effects
Set Frame Rate to 60Hz for smooth gameplay
Enable Joystick Port 1 for controller support
Enable On-screen Joystick for touch controls
Set Resolution to 2x Scale for better visibility
Configure save states for quick game pausing

description.synopsis: In the year 1000, a young adventurer named Sir Arthur enters the haunted castle of the Warlock Lord to break a curse that has plagued his family for generations. Inside, he must navigate treacherous traps, solve complex puzzles, and defeat magical creatures to reach the Warlock's chamber. The game features a dark fantasy setting with a non-linear structure, where every decision can lead to death or success.
key_features: Point-and-click interface with verb-based command system
Inventory-based puzzle solving with complex item combinations
Permadeath mechanics where player death is permanent
Non-linear exploration of a multi-level haunted castle
High difficulty with obscure puzzle solutions
Atmospheric sound design and synthesized music
Multiple endings based on player choices and inventory state
Remastered versions with updated art and music
Support for modern controllers and touch interfaces
legacy_and_impact: Shadowgate is widely regarded as one of the most influential adventure games of the 1980s, establishing the MacVenture series as a benchmark for the genre. Its reputation for extreme difficulty and obscure puzzles has cemented its status as a cult classic, inspiring countless imitators and remakes. The game's dark fantasy aesthetic and first-person perspective were groundbreaking for its time, influencing the development of future adventure titles.
